violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping clothes used for wiping food contact surfaces were left out on the counter and not in a sanitizing solution.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Prep cooler under the warmer in the kitchen was temping between 47-50 degrees.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape used on the chest freezer and stand-up cooler is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Walk-in cooler fans have debris hanging off of them and need to be cleaned. Fryer equipment has excess grease build-up and needs to be cleaned. Cappuccino machine needs cleaning on the inside.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Single-use items stored below the sink in the coffee bar area.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. Women's bathroom did not have a covered trash recepticle.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The dish area has a popcorn ceiling.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mops in the mops sink were stored in a position that did not allow them to properly dry.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
